## 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The company is **operationally healthy but pre-revenue**, and the **control plane (Paperclip) is currently offline**. The agent fleet has built a large, ready-to-sell inventory (12 digital products, 31 articles, 8 staged Fiverr gigs, 4 platform listing packages) at **zero human cash investment**, and is holding a flat, sub-cap burn. **$0 has been collected** because every revenue-collection path is gated behind founder-owned accounts (Gumroad publish, GitHub Sponsors enable, Fiverr seller account, Medium enroll). This is the single dominant risk and is **not** a build or burn problem — it is a **distribution / founder-publish gate** problem.

| Headline | Value |
|---|---|
| Target MRR | **₹5,00,000 / mo** (~$6,024/mo @ ₹83/USD) — *undocumented in repo; see §10* |
| Actual MRR (realized) | **₹0 / $0** |
| Projected best-case agent-derived MRR (M4) | ~$5,600/mo ≈ ₹4.65L (≈93% of target, still unmet) |
| Human-owned burn | **₹0** (policy-compliant) |
| Autonomous agent burn (tracked) | $70 MTD, $430/$500 cap remaining |
| Products built | 12 cataloged · 2 free lead magnets live · 10 paid staged on Gumroad |
| Platform listings staged | 4 (Gumroad, Fiverr, GitHub Sponsors, Medium) — **0 externally live** |
| Consolidated founder-gate issue | **PRE-89 (`backlog`)** — gates PRE-52 / PRE-57 / PRE-58 / PRE-54 / affiliate PRE-5 |
| Paperclip server status | **DOWN** (was RUNNING on 2026-07-14) |

- **Human-owned burn: ₹0 / $0** — ✅ policy-compliant. No ad spend, no paid tooling. Zero-investment model intact.

  - Net burn M-T-D: **$70** (= gross, revenue $0).
  - Planning run-rate (M6 pull): **$5.03/day (~$153/mo)** — flat across M2→M6 pulls; no new spend since 2026-07-12 process boot.
  - Runway to cap: ~86 days at current pace — cap will **not** be breached this month.
- **Net cash impact since launch:** **–$70.00** (cumulative burn $70, revenue $0). Breakeven requires ~4 retained $49 subscribers; covered the moment M2's 15-sub target is touched.
- **Runway to insolvency:** **not computable** — `cashBalanceCents` is still `null`; supply a `cash_balance` input to state runway in months.

> Note: the $70 is autonomous-inference cost, not founder cash outlay. Under the zero-investment policy the **founder-facing burn is ₹0**. The $500/mo AI-inference cap is a soft operating guard, not external spend.

## 7. NEXT MOST VALUABLE ACTION (specific, actionable)

**Two actions, in priority order:**

1. **(Founder) Publish the 10 staged Gumroad paid products + enable the $49/mo subscription tier (unblocks PRE-52 / PRE-89).**
   - *Why:* Highest-leverage, lowest-effort move. All 12 products are already built and drafted; 2 free lead magnets are proven live. Flipping the 10 drafted paid products ($9–$29) + the subscription tier to "published" takes ~30 min of founder login and converts the entire built catalog into a live, payment-collecting storefront. It directly attacks the dominant risk and is the fastest path to first $49 subscribers + one-time sales.
   - Do **not** wait for Fiverr / Sponsors / Medium — those are secondary. Gumroad is the only path where the product is already staged AND free lead magnets are proven live.

2. **(Founder or agent) Restart Paperclip** so the control plane + revenue ledger are observable again. The server is down (`:3100` not listening) and was running on 2026-07-14. Until it is back up, no live issue status, burn telemetry, or revenue ledger can be pulled, and the monitor cannot verify PRE-89's state. *The agent should not change configs, but a simple `npm start` / service restart of the Paperclip app is the unblock here.*

Secondary, once Gumroad is live: enable GitHub Sponsors (PRE-57, 5 tiers staged) and enroll Medium Partner (PRE-54) for near-zero-marginal-effort recurring + content revenue.

## 10. DATA-INTEGRITY NOTES

- **Paperclip server is DOWN** this run (was RUNNING 2026-07-14). `company-status.json` is therefore stale and the live board/ledger could not be re-pulled. Re-run the monitor after a restart for live issue + burn verification.
- **`REVENUE-MASTER-PLAN-v2.md` is MISSING.** The task referenced this path; it does not exist. Live strategy sources are instead: `30-day-zero-cost-launch-plan.md`, `monetization-brief-revenue-engine-v1.md`, and `revenue-strategy.md` (all present in `revenue/`). The dashboard's targets are reconciled against the monetization brief, not the missing v2 plan. **Recommend restoring the v2 master plan or pointing the dashboard's "source of truth" links at the existing docs.**
- **`₹5,00,000/mo` target is undocumented in the repo.** That figure appears in **no** file except this report (carried from the task brief). Every revenue strategy doc uses **USD** targets ($245 → $3,200/mo across 90 days). ₹5,00,000/mo ≈ **$6,024/mo** — roughly 2× the documented Month-3 conservative target and ~93% of the agent-derived M4 best case. Progress is reported against **both** the documented USD plan and the stated ₹ target, but the ₹ target needs to be written down and reconciled by the founder.
